title: [release-1.14] Bump to c/image v5.29.2, c/common to v0.57.3, and Skopeo to v1.14.2
body:
As the title says.

This pulls in the Docker Daemon API version fix, and bumps Skopeo's Z-version in preparation for RHEL 8.10/9.4.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body: Dev version commit added.  I went with .3-dev, rather than .2-dev fwiw.
